name: direct-font-size-overrides-conditional
description: Table style with firstRow conditional (28pt/56hp font size in rPr). Cell (0,0) run has direct sz=32 (16pt).
expected_behavior: Cell (0,0): 16pt/32hp font size (direct overrides conditional 28pt). Cell (0,1): 28pt/56hp font size (from conditional, no direct). Data rows: default font size.
current_status: GAP-111 — testing direct rPr > conditional rPr precedence
